name: Never on Sunday Chocolate Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring cream and half-and-half to a simmer in a large heavy saucepan.
2. Add sugar and cocoa; stir until the sugar dissolves.
3. Remove from heat. Add chopped chocolate, stirring until smooth.
4. Gradually whisk 1/2 cup of the chocolate mixture into the eggs.
5. Return the mixture to the saucepan. Stir over medium-low heat for 10-15 minutes or until the mixture thickens and coats the back of a spoon.
6. Strain into a bowl. Cool the mixture completely, stirring often.
7. Stir in the whiskey. Pour into a 1-quart ice cream churn.
8. Freeze according to the manufacturer's directions.
9. Store in a covered container for several hours to mellow the flavor. If the ice cream is frozen solid, soften in the refrigerator before serving.
